body.title: PROC_STALE_TASK_REAPER — auto-shelve TASK_SET memories older than 2h
body.result: stale_task_reaper.py + seed script written and run. PROC_STALE_TASK_REAPER seeded at 45min schedule. Shelves TASK_SET memories >2h with no resolved status. Smoke test: 0 found (existing 4 manually-closed not re-touched). Igor needs restart to pick up new habit.
body.description: Background habit runs every 45min, finds TASK_SET memories with no done/closed/shelved status older than 2 hours, marks them shelved. Prevents consolidation→NE→arc loop (observed: T-book-learner-hash-lookup cycling 195min). Logs to ~/.TheIgors/logs/stale_task_reaper.log.
